sections.sectionTitle: Paul in Korin khua-ah Lungdamna Thu Hilh

verses.text: Tua khit ciangin Athen khua panin Paul paikhia-in Korin khua-ah a tung hi

Tua lai-ah Pontas gama suak, Jew mi Aquila a kici mi khat tawh a kimu hi. Gam uk Kumpipa in Jew mi khempeuh Rom khua panin a taikhiatna dingun thu pia ahih manin Aquila leh a zi Prisilla pen Italy gam panin Korin khua a hong tun' uh a sawt nailo ahi hi. Tua nupate tawh a kimu dingin Paul zong a inn uhah va hawh a
tua nupate mah bangin Paul zong puanbuk bawl nasep tawh a nungta ahih manin amaute tawh omkhawmin na a semkhawm uh hi
Sabbath ni simin kikhopna inn-ah limtakin thu gen a, Jew mi leh Grik mite in thu a upna dingun a hanciam hi
Masedonia gam panin Silas leh Timoti hong tun' ciangin Paul in a hun neih khempeuh thuhilhna-in zang a, Jesuh pen Khrih ahi hi, ci-in Jew mite kiangah teltakin a gen hi

Jew mite in ama thuhilhna nialin a gensiat uh ciangin Paul in a puan tunga leivui bangte sin'sanin, “Pasian tawh kikhenin siatna na tuah uh leh nomau khialhna hi a, kei nong ngawhna ding uh omlo hi. Tu-a kipanin Gentail mite kiangah thu ka hilh ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Paul in tua Jew mite nusia-in Pasian a bia Gentail mi Titus Justas' inn-ah a tung hi. Tua mipa' inn pen kikhopna inn gei mahmah ahi hi
Kikhopna inn ukpa Krispas leh a innsunga om mi khempeuh in Topa thu um uh a, Korin khua-a om midang tampite in zong thuhilhna ngai-in um uh a, tui a kiphum uh hi
Zan khat, Paul in maang mu a, a maang sungah Topa in, “Lau kei in. Lungkia kei in la, na thugen zom in
Hih khuasungah keima mi tampi om a, nang hong ompih ka hih manin kuamah in nang bangmah hong cihlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin tua khua-ah kum khat leh alang sung omlai-in mite kiangah Pasian thu a hilh hi
Rom khutnuai-ah Akhaia gamsung a uk dingin Gallio a kikoih ciangin Jew mite hong kikaikhawm uh a, Paul manin zumah a paipih uh hi
Amaute in, “Hih mipa in ngeina omlopi-in mite in Pasian a biakna dingin zolding hanciam hi,” a ci uh hi

Paul in a kam ka-in thugen dingin a kipat laitakin Gallio in Jew mite kiangah, “Hih thu pen gamtat khialhna ahi a, gitloh tatna ahi zongin a gamtatna hang hi leh no Jew mite' thugente limtakin kong ngaih ding a kilawm mah ahi hi
Ahi zongin hih thu pen kam zatzia, min, leh na ngeina uh a kituh na hih manun nomau mah in khentawm un. Tua bang thute keimah in ka hong khen kei ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin
zum panin amaute a hawlkhia hi
Amaute in kikhopna inn ukpa Sosthenes manin, zum mai-ah satgawp uh a, ahi zongin Gallio in themkhat zong phamawh salo hi.

Korin khua-ah ni tampi sung thu um mite tawh Paul omkhawm lai a, tua khit ciangin amaute mangpha khakin Syria gam a zuan dingin Prisilla leh Aquila tawh teembaw a tuang uh hi. Paul in Pasian tungah thuciamnasa nei ahih manin teembaw a tuan' ma-un Korin khuapi teembaw khawlna Kenkhrea munah a sam a metsak hi
Tua bangin a pai uh ciangin Efesa khua tung uh a, Paul zong kikhopna inn-ah pai-in Jew mite tawh thu a kisel uh hi. Tua khua-ah Prisilla leh Aquila-te nupa a taam laina ding Paul in a gen hi
Thu um mi pawlkhatte in ni tampi sung Paul a tamna dingin gen uh a, ahi zongin amah tam nuamlo hi
a din'khiat ding ciangin, “Pasian deihna ahih nak leh note kiangah ka hong hawhkik ding hi,” ci-in vaikhakin, Efesa khua panin teembaw tawh a dingkhia hi
Sisaria khua a tun' ciangin Jerusalem khua-ah pai-in pawlpite va hopih a, tua ciangin Antiok khua-ah a pai hi
Antiok khua-ah tawlkhat a taam khit ciangin Galatia gam leh Frigia gamsungah pai-in thu um mi khempeuh a va thakhauhsak hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Apollos in Efesa khua-ah Thu Hilh

verses.text: Alexandria khuami Apollos a kici Jew mi khat, Efesa khua-ah hong pai hi. Amah thugen siam mahmah a, Lai Siangtho zong a thei mahmah khat ahi hi
Amah in Topa' zia thei a, lawp mahmahna tawh Jesuh' thu a mantakin a hilh hi. Ahi zongin amah in Johan' tuiphumna thu bek a thei hi
Amah in kikhopna innsungah hangtakin thu hilh ding kipan a, Prisilla leh Aquila in ama thuhilhna a zak uh ciangin a omna uh inn-ah Apollos ciahpihin, Pasian' thu paiziate a mantakin a hilhtel uh hi

Akhaia gamah Apollos pai ding a sawm ciangin, Akhaia gama om thu um mite in limtakin a na pawlbawlna ding uh deihna tawh Efesa khua-a om thu um mite in lai a khak uh hi. Amah a tun' ciangin Pasian hehpihna hangin Jesuh thu a um tua lai-a om mite-a' dingin nuamtuam mahmah hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Lai Siangtho sung siksanin Jesuh pen Khrih ahi hi, ci-in mihon lakah Jew mite tawh thu kiselin a zogawp hi.
